example: EV growth, ESS, or solar factory headline without customer, value, utilization, margin, or FCF.

condition: contract/customer/GWh/license/production date partly confirmed, but revenue, OPM, utilization, and FCF unconfirmed
example: LGES-Tesla Megapack 3 or SK On-Flatiron ESS supply is visible, but ESS margin and ramp-up remain open.

condition: revenue recognition, ESS OPM, utilization, FCF, EPS revision, and price path are visible
example: Contract value alone is not enough; the operating line must absorb fixed cost and produce measurable FCF.

condition: ESS, solid-state, recycling, or AI storage narrative is priced before contracts, revenue, or margins
example: QuantumScape/VW license can be event-premium Stage 2 plus 4B-watch, not commercialization Green.

condition: contract cancellation, expected revenue loss, idle plant, UFLPA/customs, impairment, BESS/EV fire, SOH opacity
example: Ford-LGES cancellation, Ultium Ohio idle, Qcells UFLPA furlough, Orsted impairment, or Moss Landing fire.
